brand.name: MBolt
brand.tagline: Making your brand impossible to ignore.

about.headline:
Built here.
Proven everywhere.
body: Market Bolt was founded by a group of marketing professionals who believed that Ugandan brands deserved world-class activation — not a second-tier version of it. We started with conviction, a handful of clients, and fifteen years of industry experience between us.

Today we are countrywide operators. We have put brands in people's hands, in their conversations, and in their memories. From field teams in Gulu to brand experiences in Kampala, from door-to-door distribution routes to mass communication campaigns that reached millions — we have been on the ground, in the market, doing the work.
The brands that took a chance on us in 2008 are still calling. That is not luck. That is delivery.

values.label: Execution
values.desc: We show up. We deliver. Every time, everywhere.

values.label: Honesty
values.desc: We tell clients what they need to hear, not what they want to hear.

values.label: Roots
values.desc: Proudly Ugandan. Everything we do is grounded in a deep understanding of this market.

values.label: Ambition
values.desc: We are not satisfied with good. We are building the leading experiential agency in East Africa.

services.name: BTL / Experiential Marketing
services.shortDesc: We stage real experiences that hit people in the gut.
services.fullDesc: Below-the-line marketing done at the highest level. We conceptualise, produce and execute brand experiences that move people — literally and emotionally. From field promotions to exhibition staffing, road shows to event hospitality, we have been bringing brands to life in the real world for fifteen years. Our teams are trained, our logistics are tight, and our results are measurable.

services.name: Communications
services.shortDesc: We make messages land. Every channel, every audience.
services.fullDesc: Direct communication strategies that connect your brand with real people in memorable ways. One-on-one consumer interactions or mass communication campaigns — education, awareness, sensitisation — we understand how to build a message that travels. We have run campaigns countrywide, across languages, cultures, and demographics. We know this audience.

services.name: Sales & Distribution
services.shortDesc: Door to door, done right. Products moved. Targets hit.
services.fullDesc: We execute door-to-door sales and distribution strategies built around your targets, your geography, and your deadlines. Trade route mapping, product placement, merchandising, direct sales — we have the field teams and the operational infrastructure to move products off shelves and into hands across Uganda. If it needs to reach the market, we take it there.

services.name: General Supplies
services.shortDesc: We source, we deliver, we keep you resourced.
services.fullDesc: Fifteen years of operating in Uganda means fifteen years of building relationships — with suppliers, logistics providers, and service networks across the country. We leverage that network to help clients source what they need, when they need it. Branded merchandise, event materials, promotional supplies — we connect the dots so you can focus on the bigger picture.

work.name: Retail Outreach Campaign
work.alt: Orange Telecom retail outreach activation across Uganda

team.name: Jude S. Tayebwa
team.bio: Two decades in the industry. He has worked with the largest agencies on the continent and knows every angle of what it takes to bring a brand to life in the field.

team.name: Patrick Angulo
team.bio: A founding partner whose business acumen was sharpened in India. Fifteen years across hospitality, microfinance and cable television — he makes things happen.

team.name: Abbey Senoga Ntege
team.bio: A certified accountant with 15 years navigating Ugandan business. Keeps the ship steady and makes sure every shilling is working hard.

team.name: Gerald Mukasa
team.bio: 13 years across telecoms, fintech and health. Keeps the engine running — day to day management of the agency and every project we take on.

team.name: David Lubwama
team.bio: The energy behind our field executions. He has worked with major brands across the service industry and drives every field layout we build.

team.name: Diana Kisakye
team.bio: Entrepreneurial mindset, supply chain expertise. Diana brings innovation and precision to the logistical heartbeat of the agency.

testimonials.quote: Association with MBolt has been great. They dive into the problem and do not hesitate in giving suggestions. They come up with fresh ideas and have always surpassed expectations.
testimonials.highlight: do not hesitate in giving suggestions
testimonials.name: Val Muleba
testimonials.title: Product Manager

careers.headline:
We're not looking
for people to fill roles.
careers.subheadline: We're looking for people who make roles bigger.
careers.intro: MBolt has been built by people who are deeply invested in what they do. People who show up early, stay late when the activation demands it, and genuinely care about whether the brand moment lands. If that sounds like you, we want to hear from you — whether there's a posted role or not.

values.label: Real culture
values.desc: No corporate theatre. We work hard, celebrate wins, and treat each other like professionals.

values.label: Real growth
values.desc: We have been growing for fifteen years. The people who join us grow with us.

values.label: Real impact
values.desc: Your work reaches real people in real places. You will see the results of what you do.

careers.pipelineBody: But we are always building our talent pool. If you are exceptional at what you do — field marketing, logistics, client service, creative, finance, or operations — send us your CV and a note on why MBolt. We read everything.

legal.address: Plot 1167, Kyebando Central, P.O. Box 21363, Kampala, Uganda
